queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default probability associated with individuals lacking a checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating determinants of default probability linked to maintaining critical or alternative existing credit accounts.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with elevated default probability for borrowers maintaining a checking account balance between zero and two hundred monetary units.
